features.title: Global Version Tracking
features.description: App version is now prominently tracked and displayed in the drawer.

features.title: Theme Switcher
features.description: Easily toggle between light, dark, and system default themes straight from the App Drawer.

features.description: Reading verses with the time tracker now correctly contributes to your daily streaks!
